name: Neill McNeill 1754 Land Grant
notes: Original Crown grant to Neill McNeill, part of the early Highland Scots settlement cluster west of Cross Creek. Typical headright acreage for a family-sized settlement.

name: Old Bluff Meeting House Glebe Acre
notes: The single acre set aside at founding for the meeting house and burying ground at Old Bluff (Bluff Presbyterian Church), the oldest Presbyterian congregation in Cumberland County.
